typography.accessibility: Prioritize legibility. Avoid centered text blocks for body text. Left align reading content.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-8 to p-16) to reduce cognitive load and visual clutter.
layout_and_spacing.grids: MODE B (The Control Room Grid) for Dashboard, MODE A (Bento) for Gamified Selection.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl for a soft, tactile feel.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Neumorphism (Tactile) variant: Flat solid backgrounds matching parent or slightly offset (e.g., #F3F5F2 on #FDFBF7), with very subtle ambient shadows (shadow-sm) and a sharp 1px border (border-black/5).
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Soft rounded edges (rounded-full or rounded-xl). High contrast text inside buttons. Explicit hover states with slight lift (-translate-y-0.5).
surfaces_and_components.header: Solid background (bg-[#FDFBF7]/90) with subtle bottom border. Avoid heavy glassmorphism to prevent visual distraction.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Large tap targets (min-h-[48px]). Clear explicit labels. No placeholder-only inputs.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Minimal and predictable. Avoid sudden, fast, or chaotic animations that can trigger sensory overload.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Soft transitions (duration-300). Slight scale (scale-[1.02]) and color shift.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fade and gentle slide-up for entering elements.

hero_background.description: Soft pastel gradient with subtle color shifts, used for hero section background or auth background.

ai_tutor_avatar.description: A cute toy robot character against a soft blue background. Used as the avatar for the AI Tutor Chatbot.

game_assets.description: Colorful 3D geometric shapes. Used as thumbnail or thematic background for cognitive games.

nature_calm.description: Soft sunlight filters through bare tree branches. Used for reading assessment or breathing exercise backgrounds.

specific_module_guidelines.games: Keep interfaces extremely clean. Remove all non-essential UI elements during gameplay. Use large, distinct geometric shapes with clear color coding.
specific_module_guidelines.ai_tutor: Use the ai_tutor_avatar. Implement speech-to-text with clear visual indicators (pulsing soft rings) when listening. Use large, legible text bubbles.
specific_module_guidelines.dashboard: Use flat layout. Avoid sensory overload with too many charts. Use simple progress bars, large numerical summaries, and soft color coding for achievements.

iconography: lucide-react. Use rounded, soft icons (stroke-width: 1.5 or 2).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Nunito and Figtree via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Ensure ALL interactive elements include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-memory-game-btn').
Use Shadcn UI for standard components but override borders to be softer (rounded-2xl) and remove heavy shadows.
Prioritize accessibility: Use semantic HTML, ARIA labels, and ensure high contrast (minimum 4.5:1 for text).
Do NOT use generic placeholder images. Use the provided URLs in 'media_and_images'.
